RULE-ESTABILIDADE-016.justification: The vasopressor/inotrope escalation-ladder text displays mcg/kg/min cutoffs (>0.5, >1.5) and an FC>130bpm dobutamine-stop rule that no paired v3 ml/h predicate (007/008/009) actually verifies, per CON-0060 non-interconvertible without concentration/weight; this is the cluster's single P0 escalation and clinical_impact high, mandating ratification before any vasopressor-dosing content is designed.

RULE-ESTABILIDADE-017.source_quote: capillary refill time > 5s together with an active
RULE-ESTABILIDADE-017.justification: Manual pathway C1 uses CRT strict >5s while the validated ANDROMEDA-SHOCK abnormal-perfusion threshold is >3s (matching the v3 counterpart RULE-003's correct >3), leaving a clinically material 3-5s gap where hypoperfusion goes unflagged; the P1 escalation band requires ratification of which CRT cutoff the manual pathway should carry into v2.

RULE-ESTABILIDADE-018.justification: The noradrenaline-started-in-last-24h temporal lookback is a purely structural chained-prontuario query with no numeric clinical anchor (verify:false, verdict NOT_APPLICABLE, no escalation), so it is eligible for plain ADOPT as the vasopressor-initiation-window check feeding the manual hemodynamics pathway.

RULE-ESTABILIDADE-019.source_quote: absence of vasopressin OR absence of hydrocortisone
RULE-ESTABILIDADE-019.justification: Manual C3 flags noradrenaline volume strict >21ml, but the governing _REGRAS spec text states '>= 21ml' (inclusive); v2 hemodynamics design must adopt the reference-correct inclusive >=21ml boundary (or the SSC mcg/kg/min-based adjunct trigger) rather than porting the code's stricter cutoff, since catalog verdict DISCREPANCY forbids plain ADOPT.
evidence: Evans L et al. Crit Care Med 2021

RULE-ESTABILIDADE-020.justification: Manual C4's inclusive lactate>=2.5 cutoff misses the mild hyperlactatemia 2.0-2.49 mmol/L band that Sepsis-3/SSC-2021 treat as the hypoperfusion anchor (>2 mmol/L); v2 sepsis design must adopt the reference-correct >2 mmol/L threshold, and also flag the units ambiguity (_REGRAS text says mg/dl though physiologically mmol/L).

RULE-ESTABILIDADE-021.justification: Manual C5's antihypertensive-with-adequate-pressure-or-vasopressor conflict trigger is a generic BP threshold with no numeric guideline anchor (verify:false, verdict NOT_APPLICABLE, no escalation attached), so it is eligible for plain ADOPT as the manual-pathway counterpart of the RATIFY-bound RULE-010 drug-list conflict rule.

RULE-ESTABILIDADE-022.source_quote: noradrenaline quantity EXACTLY equal to 50 ml
RULE-ESTABILIDADE-022.justification: Manual C6 fires only when noradrenaline volume is EXACTLY 50ml (clinically implausible for a continuous infusion, likely an intended >= or > 50), and CON-0164/CLU-ESTABILIDADE-C-03 explicitly route this UNVERIFIABLE, no-published-anchor institutional rule to RATIFY rather than an autonomous correction.

RULE-ESTABILIDADE-023.source_quote: Maps count of satisfied manual stability criteria
RULE-ESTABILIDADE-023.justification: The manual-pathway count-to-color aggregator (n>=3 VERMELHO, n>0 AMARELO) has no guideline anchor and is code-verified OK, but its criterio_6 counts toward the alert while being invisible in get_payload's 1..5 iteration, letting an unseen criterion silently drive VERMELHO/AMARELO; this payload/alert desync is a mechanism bug requiring ADAPT, not plain ADOPT.

RULE-ESTABILIDADE-024.justification: The estabilizacao/trilha2 text catalog labels its high-dose-noradrenaline cutoff mcg/kg/H while the sibling estabilidade facade (RULE-016) labels the same >0.5 value mcg/kg/MIN, has a structural key gap skipping criteria 8-9, and per CON-0163 nora units are not directly comparable across pathways; the P1 escalation band mandates ratification of the correct unit and whether this duplicate pathway's dosing text should be retained at all.

RULE-ESTABILIDADE-025.source_quote: criterio_6 alone is insufficient unless combined
RULE-ESTABILIDADE-025.justification: This is the alert-tiering shell for the separate estabilizacao/trilha2 v1 pathway (AMH_TM_SINTETICO_02_V), which CLU-ESTABILIDADE-19 names a 'duplicate estabilizacao pathway' retire-candidate alongside the dead v3 criteria; with no escalation forcing ratification and v3 (RULE-014) already the more complete wired mechanism, this redundant count-based tiering variant is retired rather than carried into v2 as a third parallel shock-alert implementation.

RULE-ESTABILIDADE-026.source_quote: default horario_inicio to timezone.now() at save
RULE-ESTABILIDADE-026.justification: Defaulting an unset noradrenaline/cardiac-arrest start time to save-time is a structural data-validation default with no clinical threshold (verify:false, verdict NOT_APPLICABLE, no escalation) that underpins the 'started in last 24h' temporal criteria (RULE-018), so it is eligible for plain ADOPT into the hemodynamics vasopressor-timing model.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-001.source_quote: Medical-record clinical parameter panel with pre-computed SOFA score
RULE-EVOLUCOES-001.justification: SOFA is an opaque pre-computed field with no local formula and v2 will implement its own SOFA per Vincent 1996; clinical committee must decide whether legacy component-field shape (creatinina, bilirrubinas, plaquetas, glasgow, pas/pad, po2/paco2/fio2) needs 1:1 parity or can be redesigned, per mandatory UNVERIFIABLE-band ratification (ESC-UNVERIFIABLE-262).
evidence: Vincent JL et al. Intensive Care Med 1996;22(7):707-710 (SOFA)

RULE-EVOLUCOES-002.justification: This is a UI badge-display gate (escore_sofa >= 0) with no clinical formula of its own; mandatory ratification is triggered by its UNVERIFIABLE escalation band (ESC-UNVERIFIABLE-263) even though the >=0 threshold is internally consistent with the 0-24 SOFA scale.
evidence: Vincent JL et al. Intensive Care Med 1996;22(7):707-710 (SOFA)

RULE-EVOLUCOES-003.source_quote: RASS field type mismatch across models
RULE-EVOLUCOES-003.justification: RASS is typed number in Ocupacao.InformacoesAssistenciais but string in Prontuario.DadosProntuario; Sessler 2002 defines RASS as a single 10-level integer ordinal scale (-5..+4), so the corrected v2 form must standardize on integer RASS platform-wide, per P2 escalation ESC-P2-059 and cluster constraint CLU-EVOLUCOES-C-03.
evidence: Sessler CN et al. Am J Respir Crit Care Med 2002;166(10):1338-1344 (RASS)

RULE-EVOLUCOES-004.justification: The cardiorespiratory-arrest occurrence flag is typed as free-form string while sibling boolean clinical flags (delirium, dpoc) in the same object are boolean; no Utstein-style reference governs software field type, so mandatory ratification applies via the UNVERIFIABLE escalation (ESC-UNVERIFIABLE-264) before deciding the v2 canonical type.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-005.source_quote: Company evolutions - patient name resolved by attendance number
RULE-EVOLUCOES-005.justification: This is a trivial ORM name lookup (Paciente by nr_atendimento) with a defensive getattr default and no clinical formula; despite its clear pure-plumbing character, its UNVERIFIABLE escalation band (ESC-UNVERIFIABLE-265) mandates ratification rather than agent disposition per contract policy.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-006.source_quote: Leito resolution precedence for form endpoints
RULE-EVOLUCOES-006.justification: Leito resolution precedence (ocupacoes__pk over nr_atendimento query param, else ValidationError) is Django REST view routing logic specific to the legacy trilha_homecare URL scheme; it is retired with the platform change to the AMH-Gold-consuming API surface per ADR-001, with no clinical semantics lost.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-007.source_quote: Form visibility rule - own draft or released
RULE-EVOLUCOES-007.justification: Restricting visibility of a same-type Formulario to its own author unless status is 'liberado' is a deny-by-default document-visibility invariant worth carrying into v2's access-control design (architecture/security-lgpd.md), independent of the legacy Django queryset mechanism that expresses it.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-008.source_quote: Signed PDF takes precedence over draft PDF
RULE-EVOLUCOES-008.justification: Preferring the signed PDF (pdf_assinado) over the unsigned draft (pdf) whenever both exist is a sound document-exposure precedence rule for any e-signed clinical document and is carried forward as-is into the v2 signed-document handling design.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-009.source_quote: Evolution release (liberar) gated by registered evolution type
RULE-EVOLUCOES-009.justification: Gating Tasy release on a fixed registered-tipo set with silent no-op for unregistered types (e.g. tecnico_enfermagem) is Tasy-ETL-write plumbing tied to the legacy homecare integration; it is retired under the ADR-001 platform change to AMH Data Platform consumption, and its silent-skip footgun is not carried forward.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-010.source_quote: Registered evolution types eligible for Tasy release, and their integration codes
RULE-EVOLUCOES-010.justification: The hardcoded tipo->Tasy-integration-code map (medico=1151, enfermagem=1203, etc., tecnico_enfermagem excluded) is Tasy ETL plumbing specific to the legacy release path; it is retired per ADR-001's platform change, while the underlying professional-role vocabulary itself is preserved separately via the per-discipline form-composition rules.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-011.justification: can_liberar is an unused Tasy-release eligibility predicate (tipo registered + liberar + cpf + nr_atendimento) whose only escalation concern is unclear call-site usage, not clinical intent; as Tasy-release plumbing it is retired under the ADR-001 platform change rather than ratified, per AMBIGUOUS-band policy for non-clinical rules.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-012.source_quote: AMH Docs category-code mapping per evolution type
RULE-EVOLUCOES-012.justification: The tipo-to-AMH-Docs-category switcher (EHCMED, EHCENF, etc., default EI) is legacy document-export transport plumbing tied to the AMH Docs integration; it is retired under the platform change to AMH Data Platform consumption per ADR-001.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-013.source_quote: Conditional PDF rendering of assessment sections based on filled fields
RULE-EVOLUCOES-013.justification: Flagging each PDF assessment section as 'present' whenever any single non-metadata field is non-None (sound intent: only render sections with data) has a known mechanism flaw -- a lone False/empty-string field also counts as 'filled' -- so the v2 clinical-forms rendering design must adopt the same intent with corrected per-field-type emptiness semantics.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-014.source_quote: Medical evolution displays most recent vital signs at/before its own creation time
RULE-EVOLUCOES-014.justification: Attaching to a medical evolution the single most-recent vital-signs record whose creation time is at or before the evolution's own creation time (not the globally-latest vitals) is a clinically meaningful temporal-linkage rule that is carried into the v2 correlation engine's evolution-vitals snapshot logic.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-015.source_quote: Nutritionist PDF displays pressure-injury (LPP) records from the latest nursing evolution
RULE-EVOLUCOES-015.justification: Sourcing a nutritionist evolution's pressure-injury (LPP) list from the most recently registered nursing evolution for the same bed/encounter, rather than tracking LPP independently per discipline, is a cross-form data-correlation rule worth preserving in v2's correlation engine, aside from its inconsistent empty-dict-vs-list edge case.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-016.source_quote: get_base_evolucao_context — admission date included only if Tasy micro-indicators exist for the encounter
RULE-EVOLUCOES-016.justification: Admission date is sourced conditionally from the Tasy-fed MicroIndicadores table by nr_atendimento; this Tasy ETL read-path lookup is retired under the ADR-001 platform change, since admission date in v2 comes from the AMH Data Platform's Silver-Entities patient record instead.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-017.source_quote: Medico form bundles vital-signs creation tied to daily balanco hidrico
RULE-EVOLUCOES-017.justification: Bundling vital-signs creation with an auto-created-or-looked-up daily BalancoHidrico via a `.get_pk` call that may not exist on the Django model instance is a clinically relevant vitals/fluid-balance workflow with a possible live AttributeError bug; its AMBIGUOUS escalation (ESC-AMBIGUOUS-299) requires ratification before the v2 workflow is designed.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-018.source_quote: Company-wide evolutions queryset filter with possible instance-vs-id type mismatch
RULE-EVOLUCOES-018.justification: Filtering Formulario by empresa_id against what is likely a full Empresa model instance rather than its pk is legacy multi-tenancy wiring specific to the empresa/estabelecimento hierarchy; this tenancy mechanism is retired under the ADR-001 platform change to MPI-based patient/organization identity, regardless of whether the ORM bug is real.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-019.justification: Showing edit/inactivate/re-sign controls only to the original author on a non-inactive record, with liberado records additionally offering Inativar and re-sign, mirrors the backend author-only-edit invariant (cluster constraint CLU-EVOLUCOES-C-01) and is carried into v2's access-control design as-is.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-020.justification: hideOk gating tied to a specific evolucaoComponents.canAdd/isAddKey pair from the legacy CollapseCard drawer is a UI-mechanics detail of the retired React component tree; it is retired with the frontend platform change, with no clinical semantics carried.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-021.source_quote: Conditional sub-fields driven by selected option (conditions map)
RULE-EVOLUCOES-021.justification: The schema-driven conditions map (select/boolean/checkbox/multicheck reveal sub-fields keyed by campo.conditions[value]) is a sound show-if/required-if form-engine pattern; its Ant-Design-specific SubForm* implementation is superseded, but the same conditional-field semantics are adapted into the v2 clinical-forms engine design.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-022.justification: SubFormCheckbox keys conditional fields off e.target.value on an antd Checkbox, which only ever carries e.target.checked, so the conditions lookup is always undefined and no conditional field has ever rendered through this path; with no working behavior to preserve, this AMBIGUOUS-banded dead code (ESC-AMBIGUOUS-327) is retired in favor of the correct pattern already captured in RULE-EVOLUCOES-021.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-023.source_quote: Dynamic clinical-form field-type vocabulary (declared union vs render dispatch)
RULE-EVOLUCOES-023.justification: The CampoType union declares 11 field types but SelectCampoType's render dispatch implements only 10, silently dropping 'time' fields; the P3-escalated (ESC-P3-160) corrected form is to implement dispatch for all 11 declared types, preserving the full vocabulary as a v2 clinical-forms asset.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-024.source_quote: criar_sepse_evolucao / get_ultimos_sinais_vitais — sepsis note auto-linked to most recent vitals
RULE-EVOLUCOES-024.justification: Auto-linking a newly created Sepse evolution to the most recently created SinaisVitais record sharing the same nr_atendimento (or null if none exists) is a clinically meaningful sepsis-workflow linkage rule carried forward into v2's sepsis domain vitals-association logic.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-025.source_quote: Evolution signing workflow and signature-date assignment
RULE-EVOLUCOES-025.justification: Stamping dt_assinatura from dt_registro instead of the Cryptocubo signing service's own timestamp misrepresents the true signing moment whenever signing happens after document creation; cluster constraint CLU-EVOLUCOES-C-02 and P3 escalation ESC-P3-116 both require the v2 design to record the actual signature timestamp instead.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-026.source_quote: Auto sign-and-release on create when status is "liberado"
RULE-EVOLUCOES-026.justification: Automatically triggering both signing and Tasy release in the same request whenever a new evolution is created with status=='liberado' (no way to sign without releasing, or vice versa) expresses a sound atomic-transition intent; the same atomicity is adapted into v2's e-signature workflow while the Cryptocubo/Tasy-specific mechanism is superseded.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-027.source_quote: Auto sign-and-release on update when status is "liberado", gated by edit-eligibility
RULE-EVOLUCOES-027.justification: Re-running the same atomic sign+release logic on update, but only after validar_atualizacao confirms the record is non-inactive and edited by its original author, composes the edit-eligibility invariant with the auto-sign-on-release intent from RULE-EVOLUCOES-026; the same composed semantics are adapted into v2's document-lifecycle design.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-028.source_quote: Form manage_data - required identifiers and content wrapping
RULE-EVOLUCOES-028.justification: Stamping every write payload with tipo/leito/nr_atendimento derived strictly from the ocupacoes__pk URL kwarg and wrapping each conteudo block into a '<conteudo>_data' key is a legacy Django REST serialization-shaping detail tied to the trilha_homecare API surface; it is retired with the API platform change per ADR-001.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-029.justification: anterior_indicadores looks up the previous same-type Formulario without the author/status visibility filter enforced by the main list endpoint, letting another user's still-draft form leak into the 'previous form' payload; the P3-escalated (ESC-P3-117) corrected design must apply the same visibility parity as RULE-EVOLUCOES-007.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-030.source_quote: Form destroy() does not call validar_inativacao (dead validation)
RULE-EVOLUCOES-030.justification: destroy() marks a Formulario inativo and logs an audit action without ever calling validar_inativacao, so a liberado (signed/released) record can be silently inactivated; cluster constraint CLU-EVOLUCOES-C-01 and P3 escalation ESC-P3-118 both require the v2 design to enforce the inactivation guard that this legacy endpoint dropped.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-031.justification: The physician evolution's four content blocks (impressao_geral, impressao_medica, plano_terapeutico, conduta_medica) gated by can_preencher_formulario_medico define the medico-specific clinical form structure and are adopted verbatim as the v2 medico form-section vocabulary.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-032.justification: The nursing evolution form's single impressao_geral content block, gated by can_preencher_formulario_enfermeiro, defines the minimal enfermagem form structure and is adopted verbatim as the v2 enfermagem form-section vocabulary.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-033.source_quote: Tecnico de enfermagem form content composition
RULE-EVOLUCOES-033.justification: The nursing-technician evolution form's single impressao_geral content block, gated by can_preencher_formulario_tec_enfermagem, defines the minimal tecnico_enfermagem form structure and is adopted verbatim as the v2 form-section vocabulary for that role.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-034.justification: The physiotherapist evolution's two content blocks (impressao_geral, meta_terapeutica) gated by can_preencher_formulario_fisioterapeuta define the fisioterapeuta-specific form structure and are adopted verbatim as the v2 form-section vocabulary for that discipline.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-035.justification: The clinical pharmacist evolution's five content blocks (impressao_geral, conciliacao_medicamentosa, conduta_farmaceutica, profilaxias, meta_terapeutica) gated by can_preencher_formulario_farmaceutico define its form structure and are adopted verbatim into v2, aligning with the pharmaco-interaction domain's medication-reconciliation needs.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-036.justification: The speech-language-therapy evolution's four content blocks (impressao_geral, avaliacao_fonoaudiologica, conduta_fonoaudiologica, meta_terapeutica) gated by can_preencher_formulario_fonoaudiologo define its form structure and are adopted verbatim as the v2 fonoaudiologo form-section vocabulary.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-037.justification: The music-therapy evolution's three content blocks (impressao_geral, conduta_realizada, meta_terapeutica) gated by can_preencher_formulario_musicoterapeuta define its form structure and are adopted verbatim as the v2 musicoterapeuta form-section vocabulary.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-038.justification: The nutritionist evolution's four content blocks (impressao_geral, avaliacao_diaria_nutricionista, meta_terapeutica, objetivos_diarios_pendencias) gated by can_preencher_formulario_nutricionista define its form structure and are adopted verbatim as the v2 nutricionista form-section vocabulary.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-039.justification: The psychologist evolution's four content blocks (impressao_geral, avaliacao_psicologica, conduta_psicologica, meta_terapeutica) gated by can_preencher_formulario_psicologo define its form structure and are adopted verbatim as the v2 psicologo form-section vocabulary.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-040.source_quote: Generic therapist form has no extra content blocks beyond base
RULE-EVOLUCOES-040.justification: Sound intent (a therapist evolution needs only the base impressao_geral block) carries forward as a content-model asset, but the mechanism (Django permission_trilhas RBAC gate, exceto_metodo GET check) is legacy plumbing superseded by the new platform's auth model per ADR-001 C-07.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-041.source_quote: suggests incident forms may capture billing-relevant out-of-pocket costs
RULE-EVOLUCOES-041.justification: The intercorrencia content-block set (impressao_geral, descricao, intervencao, desfecho, relato_gastos) is a sound clinical-documentation asset to keep, but its legacy Django view mechanism and permission_trilhas gating are superseded by the new form-engine and auth model.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-042.source_quote: Every clinical evolution/progress-note form has exactly one of three lifecycle states
RULE-EVOLUCOES-042.justification: This is the canonical salvo/liberado/inativo tri-state lifecycle, RECONCILED against backend and frontend with no BE/FE divergence found, matching cluster invariant CLU-EVOLUCOES-C-01 that this 3-state lifecycle MUST be preserved unchanged in v2.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-043.source_quote: Status drives available actions and the displayed icon/color
RULE-EVOLUCOES-043.justification: The intent that each lifecycle state gets a distinct visual treatment and success message is sound UX, but the specific mdi icon set and hardcoded hex colors (#258a10, #1890ff, #ff1633) are legacy presentation detail to be re-expressed in the new design system.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-044.source_quote: merging the current form values (optionally adapted by adaptSubmit)
RULE-EVOLUCOES-044.justification: Releasing/signing an evolution by setting status=liberado plus an assinar flag is sound clinical-workflow intent, but the direct PATCH-merge mechanism and dt_registro string reformatting are legacy frontend plumbing to be redesigned around the new document-signing service.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-045.source_quote: a confirmation modal offers two actions
RULE-EVOLUCOES-045.justification: Offering caregivers a distinct 'save as draft' vs 'save and release/sign' choice is sound clinical UX worth preserving, but the Modal.confirm/onPostEvolucao wiring is legacy React component plumbing that the new screen implementation will replace.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-046.source_quote: the new evolution form is prefilled from the patient's last saved form
RULE-EVOLUCOES-046.justification: Prefilling a new evolution from the patient's last saved form and resetting the registration timestamp to now is sound clinical carry-forward behavior, but the getLastForm/adaptValues plumbing is legacy React-hook mechanism to be reimplemented against the new API.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-047.source_quote: allowing a new form entry to reference/pre-populate values from the most recent prior submission
RULE-EVOLUCOES-047.justification: Retrieving prior-form indicators for the same bed occupation to pre-populate a new entry is a sound clinical carry-forward capability, but the dedicated untyped ('any') REST endpoint per route is legacy plumbing to redesign against the new API contract.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-048.source_quote: manually encodes profissional_id/data_inicio/data_fim directly into the URL string
RULE-EVOLUCOES-048.justification: This is a legacy axios networking quirk (hand-built query string plus a possibly-duplicated params object) with no clinical semantics; band AMBIGUOUS resolves to RETIRE since the behavior is not clinically worth keeping, per escalation ESC-AMBIGUOUS-328, and the new API client eliminates this dual-encoding risk entirely.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-049.source_quote: Turning it OFF marks the group isAnnulled
RULE-EVOLUCOES-049.justification: The recursive nullifyFields mechanic (replacing an annulled group's value with {} or [] per its declared type) is a sound, well-specified implementation of the soft-void concept whose overall clinical meaning is escalated in RULE-EVOLUCOES-074; the concrete submit-time behavior itself should carry forward in the new form engine.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-050.source_quote: Turning it OFF sets the whole subgroup value to null
RULE-EVOLUCOES-050.justification: A checavel subgroup toggle that defaults ON only when data already exists, hides fields while OFF, and nulls the subgroup value on disable is sound conditional-capture UX to retain, though the Switch/verifyNullKeys React implementation is legacy plumbing to redesign.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-051.source_quote: An evolution document whose status is
RULE-EVOLUCOES-051.justification: Forbidding any update to an inativo evolution is a core audit-integrity invariant required by cluster constraint CLU-EVOLUCOES-C-01 and by CFM NGS-2 recordkeeping expectations (VIS-C-07); this deny rule carries forward unchanged into the security/authorization layer.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-052.source_quote: can only be updated by the same user who created
RULE-EVOLUCOES-052.justification: Restricting edits to the original author (preenchido_por) is exactly the deny-by-default authorization pattern the project's own lessons-worth-keeping guidance calls out; it should be carried forward verbatim as a security invariant regardless of the message-wording ambiguity noted for RULE-EVOLUCOES-052 itself.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-053.source_quote: A user without a registered CPF cannot release
RULE-EVOLUCOES-053.justification: Requiring a registered CPF before a clinician can release (liberar) an evolution is a Brazilian professional-identity gate tied to CFM accountability for the final clinical decision (VIS-C-08); this invariant carries forward unchanged into the v2 signing/release flow.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-054.source_quote: must have both a registered CPF and a registered PIN
RULE-EVOLUCOES-054.justification: Requiring both CPF and PIN before digitally signing an evolution PDF is a sound two-factor identity gate for medical-legal signatures under CFM 2.299/2021 recordkeeping expectations and should be preserved unchanged as a v2 security invariant.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-055.source_quote: this method is DEFINED but never invoked by destroy() in this commit
RULE-EVOLUCOES-055.justification: The intent (never allow inactivating an already-liberado record) is correct and matches CLU-EVOLUCOES-C-01, but the legacy validar_inativacao guard is dead code never invoked on the actual delete path; the reference-correct form wires this guard directly into destroy() so it is actually enforced in v2, per the paired defect in RULE-EVOLUCOES-030.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-056.source_quote: the nutritionist evolution form requires avaliacao_global, terapia_nutricional
RULE-EVOLUCOES-056.justification: The nutritionist form's uniquely strict requirement of avaliacao_global, terapia_nutricional, and avaliacao_abdominal (unlike every sibling role form, which marks these required=False) is a deliberate, discipline-specific clinical-completeness rule worth preserving as-is.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-057.source_quote: this field name is absent from every fields tuple in Meta
RULE-EVOLUCOES-057.justification: This is a Django REST Framework serializer defect (a declared, required field excluded from every Meta.fields/action_fields variant) unique to the legacy DRF stack per escalation ESC-P3-161; it is obsolete with the platform change and the underlying dispositivos_invasivos vocabulary is preserved separately via other nursing-form rules, not this bug.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-058.source_quote: each campo's data dict must contain an 'id' key identifying the existing sub-record
RULE-EVOLUCOES-058.justification: Requiring an explicit id per sub-form campo when updating a dynamic evolution, and silently skipping campos with falsy valor, is sound update-targeting intent worth keeping, but the Python loop over campos_formulario with a bare KeyError-to-ValidationError translation is legacy backend plumbing to redesign around the new API's schema validation.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-059.justification: Preventing the original registration datetime from being altered when editing a past evolution is a sound audit-integrity invariant, but the current mechanism is a client-side-only disabledField flag with no server-side enforcement noted; v2 must enforce the same immutability server-side, not merely disable the UI control.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-060.source_quote: are coerced from string (as received from the API) to number via unary plus
RULE-EVOLUCOES-060.justification: Coercing peso/altura/imc from API-returned strings to numbers via unary-plus, with silent NaN on malformed input and no reverse coercion on submit, is a legacy JSON-typing workaround; FHIR Observation.valueQuantity is natively numeric-typed, making this ad hoc client coercion obsolete with the platform change.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-061.source_quote: is converted between a moment/date object (for display in the form) and a plain string
RULE-EVOLUCOES-061.justification: This moment.js <-> string date-adapter pattern, applied inconsistently between the enfermagem and tec_enfermagem forms (tec_enfermagem omits dispositivos_invasivos handling), is legacy frontend date-serialization plumbing that a consistently-typed v2 date field across all role forms makes unnecessary.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-062.source_quote: is implemented in useEvolucaoMenu under the object key
RULE-EVOLUCOES-062.justification: The 11-role professional-form vocabulary is a genuine asset, but the pharmacist entry uses the feminine, type-union-absent key 'formulario_farmaceutica' instead of the masculine 'formulario_farmaceutico' used by its own gating permission and every sibling role key; per escalation ESC-P3-162 the reference-correct form renames this key to match the masculine pattern and adds it to the role enum.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-063.source_quote: so a new record does not inherit ids copied from the prefilled
RULE-EVOLUCOES-063.justification: Stripping inherited ids before POSTing a new evolution (so it does not silently overwrite the prefilled last-form record) is sound intent, but the clearIds/removeIds implementation only strips one level deep and leaves array-element ids untouched; the corrected form should deep-strip ids recursively.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-064.source_quote: Every dynamic prontuario field is disabled (read-only) when the form is in view mode
RULE-EVOLUCOES-064.justification: disableAll = disabledOnEdit || mode===in_page || nullCampo is the correct, consistently-applied reference semantics for read-only field state across the dynamic form engine, and is the baseline that RULE-EVOLUCOES-065's inverted logic is corrected against.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-065.source_quote: INVERTS isAnnulled, which diverges from the disableAll semantics
RULE-EVOLUCOES-065.justification: SubFormString's disable expression inverts isAnnulled (disabling when the group is NOT annulled, the opposite of every other subform) and can throw when the nullifier is missing; per escalation ESC-P3-163 the reference-correct form aligns SubFormString to the same disableAll/nullCampo semantics already adopted from RULE-EVOLUCOES-064.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-066.source_quote: validated to lie within [campo.min, campo.max] inclusive
RULE-EVOLUCOES-066.justification: Inclusive min/max numeric range validation plus a required-when-flagged rule is a straightforward, correctly-specified field-level constraint of the dynamic form engine that should carry forward as-is into the v2 clinical-forms validation schema.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-067.source_quote: entered via a Slider constrained to campo.min..campo.max
RULE-EVOLUCOES-067.justification: A Slider-based interval input intrinsically clamped to campo.min/campo.max, degrading to a disabled Input in read-only mode, is a correctly-specified field behavior of the dynamic form engine worth carrying forward unchanged.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-068.source_quote: validates the number of selected options as an array within [campo.min, campo.max]
RULE-EVOLUCOES-068.justification: Validating a multicheck field's selection count as an array length within [campo.min, campo.max], with conditional sub-fields flattened across all checked values, is a correctly-specified engine behavior to preserve as-is (only the user-facing message text omitting the min bound needs future copy-editing).

RULE-EVOLUCOES-069.source_quote: applies campo.mask and validates against campo.regex
RULE-EVOLUCOES-069.justification: Applying an input mask and validating against a per-field regex pattern, with required flag driven by campo.required, is a correctly-specified masked-field constraint of the dynamic form engine to carry forward unchanged.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-070.source_quote: lets the user add repeated sub-item groups
RULE-EVOLUCOES-070.justification: Capping the number of repeatable list items at campo.max (unbounded when undefined), with the add control hidden once the cap is reached or the form is read-only, is a correctly-specified list-field behavior worth preserving unchanged in the v2 form engine.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-071.source_quote: apply the standard required rule only when campo.required is true
RULE-EVOLUCOES-071.justification: Gating the standard required-field rule strictly on campo.required across text/date/select/boolean/checkbox/extra field types, including the extra field inheriting its parent's required flag, is correctly-specified and should carry forward unchanged into the v2 form validation schema.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-072.source_quote: The dynamic-form engine (used to render clinical evolution forms) supports declaring
RULE-EVOLUCOES-072.justification: This is the core Campo type schema (required/min/max/regex/mask/conditions/formList/disabledOnEdit) underpinning all eleven field-level validation rules in this shard; it is the declarative engine contract that the v2 clinical-forms schema should adopt as its baseline field-definition shape.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-073.source_quote: allows additional Campo[] to be shown only when the field's own value equals
RULE-EVOLUCOES-073.justification: The conditions map, keyed by a governing field's value to reveal additional Campo[] definitions, is the correctly-specified conditional/dependent field visibility mechanism of the dynamic form engine and should be adopted unchanged as part of the v2 Campo schema.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-074.source_quote: this implies clinical-record groups can be marked as void/annulled rather than physically deleted
RULE-EVOLUCOES-074.justification: The anulavel/nullifiers type shapes strongly suggest a medical-legal audit-trail pattern (void rather than delete), which is clinically valuable if confirmed, but per the shard's own low-confidence, inference-only note no code in this partition actually sets isAnnulled or reads anulavel, so per escalation ESC-AMBIGUOUS-329 product/clinical sign-off is required before design commits to this semantics.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-075.source_quote: The patient-encounter identifier is represented inconsistently across models
RULE-EVOLUCOES-075.justification: The same domain concept (encounter identifier) is split across a numero_atendimento:number field in Prontuario and an nr_atendimento:string field in BalancoHidrico/Evolucao; per cluster invariant CLU-EVOLUCOES-C-03 and escalation ESC-P3-164, the reference-correct form is one canonical, single-named, single-typed encounter identifier used platform-wide, not the legacy split.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-076.source_quote: Patient gender is restricted to one of four codes system-wide
RULE-EVOLUCOES-076.justification: The closed four-value gender enumeration (M/F/O/N, i.e. Masculino/Feminino/Outro/Nao informado) used consistently across Prontuario, Ocupacao, Chat, and Estatisticas is a controlled PT-BR clinical vocabulary asset to adopt verbatim, accents and letter codes included, into the v2 clinical-forms vocabulary.

RULE-EVOLUCOES-077.source_quote: requires a professional (profissional_id) and a start date (data_inicio) to be filled in
RULE-EVOLUCOES-077.justification: Requiring a professional and start date, validating that an optional end date is not before the start date, and disabling out-of-range calendar days is a correctly-specified report-filter validation to preserve; only the report screen implementation itself changes in v2, not the constraint logic.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-001.source_quote: Canonical pressure-injury (Lesao Por Pressao) staging classification
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-001.justification: Backend canonical NPUAP/EPUAP six-category LPP staging enum is verdict VERIFIED with status OK and no escalation; staging values match both frontend forms (RULE-002/003) with zero divergence, so it is adopted unchanged as the source-of-truth wound-staging vocabulary for the v2 clinical-forms design doc.
evidence: NPUAP/EPUAP/PPPIA Pressure Injury Staging System (Edsberg LE et al., J Wound Ostomy Continence Nurs 2016)

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-002.justification: Status DISCREPANCY forbids plain ADOPT: this nursing/dietitian form's top-tier peri-wound-edema value crepitacao_edema_com_sulco_maior_4cm and its 4-option exudate set diverge from the backend canonical (RULE-004: crepitacao_maior_4cm, 5 options including pequeno); the reference-correct form realigns both fields to the backend enum in the unified v2 wound-assessment screen.
evidence: Bates-Jensen Wound Assessment Tool (BWAT) Peripheral Tissue Edema/Exudate Amount items

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-003.source_quote: stores a DIVERGENT peri-wound-edema top-tier value
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-003.justification: Status DISCREPANCY forbids plain ADOPT even though this TecEnfermagem value crepitacao_maior_4cm already matches the backend canonical (RULE-004) and only the nursing/dietitian form (RULE-002) diverges; adopted as the reference-correct peri-wound-edema top tier that RULE-002 must be corrected to match in the unified v2 enum.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-004.source_quote: Peri-wound edema classification enum encoding numeric extent thresholds
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-004.justification: Status DISCREPANCY forbids plain ADOPT: this is the backend canonical 4 cm peri-wound-edema enum that matches the published BWAT Peripheral Tissue Edema scale and the TecEnfermagem form (RULE-003); it is adopted as the reference-correct form that the nursing/dietitian form (RULE-002) must be corrected to match, closing the cross-discipline value drift.
evidence: Bates-Jensen Wound Assessment Tool (BWAT) Peripheral Tissue Edema item

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-005.justification: Verdict DISCREPANCY (status OK, clinical_impact low) forbids plain ADOPT: the >5 s capillary-refill-time alert threshold is substantially more lenient than the published abnormal cutoff (>2-3 s; sepsis literature uses >3 s per ANDROMEDA-SHOCK), so the reference-correct hemodynamics-domain alert fires at >3 s instead of >5 s, closing the 3-5 s prolonged-refill blind spot.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-006.source_quote: TecEnfermagem diet block with route booleans, acceptance enum
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-006.justification: Status OK and verdict NOT_APPLICABLE permit plain ADOPT: the diet route/acceptance vocabulary and vomit/gastric-residue numeric fields are a sound discipline-specific documentation asset with input-validation-only numeric bounds (0-10000 ml, not a clinical decision threshold), carried into the v2 clinical-forms diet block unchanged.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-007.source_quote: Home-care incident record captures trigger type, urgency grade
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-007.justification: Status OK and verdict NOT_APPLICABLE permit plain ADOPT: the trigger-type/urgency-grade/symptom-multicheck vocabulary is a documentation-content asset independent of the legacy Django view mechanism, carried forward into the v2 clinical-forms home-care incident screen per the same content-vs-mechanism split already applied to sibling Intercorrencia rules.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-008.source_quote: Physiotherapy global assessment captures edema grade, general state, delirium
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-008.justification: Status OK and verdict NOT_APPLICABLE permit plain ADOPT: the edema-grade/general-state/delirium enums plus the two mobilization-contraindication booleans are a sound eligibility-flag vocabulary that does not itself auto-block conduct, carried into the v2 clinical-forms physiotherapy screen as documentation content.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-009.source_quote: a boolean flag reveals a required free-text specific intervention
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-009.justification: Status OK and verdict NOT_APPLICABLE permit plain ADOPT: the intervention multicheck plus its conditional free-text reveal is a sound content-model asset for the home-care incident conduct record, kept unchanged in the v2 clinical-forms screen independent of the legacy Django view it currently runs on.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-010.justification: Status OK and verdict NOT_APPLICABLE, but the tec_5s exam-finding checkbox restates the same >5 s capillary-refill cutoff corrected in RULE-005; the physical-exam vocabulary is otherwise a sound asset, so it is adopted with the tec_5s label renamed to track the corrected >3 s threshold, keeping the two forms consistent.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-011.source_quote: Edema scale MMII1..3 is an ordinal lower-limb edema grade.
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-011.justification: Status OK and verdict NOT_APPLICABLE permit plain ADOPT: the ordinal MMII1-3/anasarca edema grade, general-state enum, and assistance-risk multicheck (falls, allergy, delirium, LPP) form a sound nursing global-assessment vocabulary reused verbatim across disciplines, carried into the v2 clinical-forms nursing screen.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-012.source_quote: O2 flow ceiling 1000 L/min is physiologically implausible
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-012.justification: Sound intent to capture O2 flow rate and aspiration count is kept, but the mechanism (a 0-1000 L/min input-validation bound) is physiologically implausible for any clinical O2 delivery device per the cluster's systemic numeric-bounds finding, so the reference-correct v2 field caps the bound at a clinically plausible high-flow ceiling instead of the legacy 1000 L/min.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-013.source_quote: selecting 'fralda' (diaper) in the diuresis multicheck reveals a 24 h change-count field
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-013.justification: Status OK and verdict NOT_APPLICABLE permit plain ADOPT: the diuresis multicheck with its conditional 24h diaper-change-count reveal is a sound discipline-specific documentation asset, carried into the v2 clinical-forms genitourinary screen unchanged.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-014.source_quote: TecEnfermagem records high-cost drugs/antibiotics with administration route and body site
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-014.justification: Escalation band UNVERIFIABLE mandates ratification per policy: the route/body-site abbreviations are standard Brazilian clinical shorthand but the overall list is a proprietary internal data-capture vocabulary with no published scale, formula, or dose calculation to audit, so a human must confirm whether this vocabulary is reused as-is or restructured before the v2 medication-administration screen is designed.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-015.source_quote: Disposition of an incident, from referral to medical/nursing/APH/hospital visits
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-015.justification: Status OK and verdict NOT_APPLICABLE permit plain ADOPT: the disposition/outcome enum spanning referral types through telephone guidance to home death is a sound content-model asset for the home-care incident record, carried into the v2 clinical-forms screen unchanged.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-016.source_quote: Physiotherapy interventions selectable as respiratory and motor technique multichecks.
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-016.justification: Status OK and verdict NOT_APPLICABLE permit plain ADOPT: the respiratory and motor technique multicheck vocabulary (bronchial-hygiene maneuvers, cough techniques, kinesiotherapy variants) is a sound discipline-specific documentation asset carried into the v2 clinical-forms physiotherapy conduct screen unchanged.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-017.source_quote: No logic beyond SVG markup found; kept as AMBIGUOUS per ground rules
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-017.justification: Escalation band AMBIGUOUS resolves to RETIRE, not RATIFY, because the icon carries zero executable logic and the actual home-care intercorrencia data model it merely gestures at is already fully captured by RULE-007 (triage), RULE-009 (intervention), and RULE-015 (disposition); nothing clinical is lost by retiring the bare icon marker.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-018.source_quote: allow_null and allow_blank both True -> the field can be submitted empty
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-018.justification: The nova_lesao/lesao_previa origin distinction is a sound, clinically standard basis for hospital-acquired vs community-acquired pressure-injury reporting and matches both frontend forms with no value divergence, but allow_null=True plus allow_blank=True lets this clinically meaningful field be submitted empty, so the reference-correct v2 field makes tipo_lpp required with no blank/null option.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-019.source_quote: Structured list for non-pressure lesions with type, location, aspect, dressing
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-019.justification: Status OK and verdict NOT_APPLICABLE permit plain ADOPT: the non-pressure lesion type/location/aspect/dressing/frequency vocabulary is a sound documentation asset shared across nursing forms, carried into the v2 clinical-forms wound-assessment screen unchanged.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-020.justification: The 44-site anatomical vocabulary for lesion/catheter-site documentation is a sound shared asset, but it carries load-bearing spelling defects (toronozelo_lateral/medial instead of tornozelo, inframaria_d/e instead of inframamaria) and a redundant sacro_coccix plus separate sacral/coccix pair; the reference-correct v2 vocabulary keeps the 44 anatomical concepts but corrects the spelling and removes the duplicate region.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-021.source_quote: direct dict indexing with NO default -> KeyError on any code
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-021.justification: Status DISCREPANCY forbids plain ADOPT: the shared 16-code chronic-diagnosis catalog (codes and labels, including their verbatim typos) matches exactly between backend and frontend and is preserved as-is, but the backend's no-default dict lookup (KeyError on any unlisted code) and the frontend's trailing-comma sparse-array hole are implementation bugs; the reference-correct v2 form adds a safe default/fallback label and removes the stray trailing comma.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-022.source_quote: Maps device/dressing tracking field codes to labels
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-022.justification: Status OK and verdict NOT_APPLICABLE permit plain ADOPT: the ten-field device/dressing tracking catalog (insertion date, next-change date, phlebitis, palpable thrill) is a sound monitoring-field vocabulary with graceful unknown-code handling, carried into the v2 clinical-forms vascular-access screen unchanged.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-023.source_quote: Typos in labels (Traquestomia, Jejunostopia) preserved verbatim.
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-023.justification: The eight-item invasive-devices multicheck vocabulary is a sound documentation asset, but two of its codes carry spelling defects (traquestomia instead of traqueostomia, jejunostopia instead of jejunostomia) with no cross-form dependency forcing the old spelling to be kept, so the reference-correct v2 vocabulary corrects both codes while preserving the remaining six unchanged.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-024.source_quote: Multicheck of respiratory/support equipment in use.
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-024.justification: The concentrador_oxigenio/cilindro_o2/bipap/cpap/coughassist/aspirador/ventilador_mecanico multicheck is a controlled respiratory-equipment vocabulary worth carrying into the v2 clinical-forms schema verbatim; category data-validation with status OK and no escalation supports plain adoption.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-025.source_quote: Speech therapist global assessment with communication mode
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-025.justification: The Fono global-assessment enum set (estado_geral, orientacao, emocional, comunicacao, respiracao, alimentacao, via) is a controlled PT-BR clinical vocabulary shared across disciplines and should be adopted verbatim into the v2 clinical-forms vocabulary layer.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-026.source_quote: Orofacial structure motility/tone and expressive/receptive language state enums.
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-026.justification: Orofacial motilidade/tonicidade and expressiva/receptiva language-state enums are a sound speech-therapy vocabulary asset; the noted 'Ausênte' label mis-accent is presentation-layer only (stored value 'ausente' is correct) so the value set adopts unchanged while the label gets corrected in the new UI.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-027.source_quote: Music therapist global assessment covering general state (5-level)
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-027.justification: The 5-level estado_geral scale plus communication/visual-contact/orientation/motor-coordination enums form a self-contained music-therapy assessment vocabulary with no computed scoring, making it a straightforward vocabulary asset to adopt into v2 clinical-forms.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-028.source_quote: Multicheck of the patient's relationship to musical instruments
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-028.justification: This music-therapy-specific instrument-interaction multicheck (nao_registra_presenca...explora_instrumentos_musicais) is a discipline-unique controlled vocabulary with no analog elsewhere in the catalog, so it should be adopted verbatim as a music-therapy form asset.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-029.source_quote: Abdominal exam enums for shape, bowel sounds, pain, palpable masses, peristalsis.
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-029.justification: The abdominal-exam enum set (geral shape multicheck, ruidos_hidroaereos, presenca_dor, massas_palpaveis, peristalse) is a standard nursing physical-exam vocabulary with no scoring logic, appropriate for direct adoption into the v2 nursing assessment form.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-030.source_quote: Genitourinary exam with boolean lesion/secretion flags and a diuresis-route multicheck.
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-030.justification: The genitourinary boolean/string fields plus the ausente|presente|svd|sva|fralda diurese-route multicheck are a controlled nursing vocabulary that TecEnfermagem extends with a fralda->nr_trocas_24h conditional (RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-013), so the base set adopts as-is.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-031.source_quote: Neuro exam enums for pupils, orientation, emotional state, tone, eye-opening, motor deficit.
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-031.justification: The neuro-exam enum set (pupilas, orientacao, emocional, tonus, abertura_ocular mirroring GCS eye-opening labels, deficit_motor) is a controlled categorical vocabulary reused across multiple discipline forms, warranting adoption into the shared v2 neuro-assessment vocabulary.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-032.source_quote: adds peripheral-perfusion, ventilatory rhythm/pattern, adventitious sounds, cough efficacy
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-032.justification: This physiotherapy neuro/cardio/respiratory block adds perfusao_periferica, ritmo/padrao_ventilatorio, murmurio_vesicular, secrecao_traqueal and cough-efficacy enums beyond the shared neuro base, forming a discipline-specific respiratory-exam vocabulary asset for v2 adoption.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-033.source_quote: Motor-function assessment enums for mobility (plegia/paresis patterns), tone, trophism
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-033.justification: The motor-function enums (mobilidade plegia/paresis patterns, tonus_muscular, trofismo, deformidades_contraturas) are a physiotherapy-specific controlled vocabulary with no computed score, suitable for direct adoption into the v2 physiotherapy assessment form.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-034.source_quote: Psychologist global assessment covering general state, orientation/reactivity
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-034.justification: The psychologist global-assessment enums (estado_geral, orientacao, emocional, abertura_ocular) reuse the shared neuro/emotional vocabulary already adopted under RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-031, so this discipline-specific reuse adopts unchanged.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-035.source_quote: Psychological assessment covering attitude toward interviewer, mood, disease awareness
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-035.justification: The psychological-assessment enums (atitude, humor, consciencia_da_doenca, pensamento) plus free-text symptom/complaint fields form a discipline-specific vocabulary with no scoring or threshold logic, appropriate for plain adoption into v2 clinical-forms.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-036.source_quote: TecEnfermagem global assessment covering edema grade, general state, boolean signs
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-036.justification: The TecEnfermagem global-assessment block (edema grade scale, estado_geral, boolean signs, and the acamado|deambula|deambula_auxilio|cadeirante locomotion enum) is a controlled nursing-technician vocabulary suitable for direct v2 adoption.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-037.source_quote: Ten dedicated React icon components exist for named clinical/professional disciplines
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-037.justification: The escalation itself flags this as AMBIGUOUS because the icon-derived 10-discipline list cannot be confirmed exhaustive (icons may exist elsewhere out of partition scope) and one component has a typo'd internal name, yet the underlying question of which roles the v2 multidisciplinary care-team model must recognize is clinically material, so per ESC-AMBIGUOUS-301 this requires product/clinical ratification rather than agent decision.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-038.justification: Per escalation ESC-P3-119, the Terapeuta.jsx and Psicologo.jsx icons are byte-identical SVGs differing only in an aspect-ratio multiplier, a legacy copy-paste UI asset bug with zero clinical content that the new design system's icon set will not carry forward, so this dead/duplicate asset is retired rather than adopted.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-039.source_quote: Two dedicated icon components exist for gender/sex representation
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-039.justification: The Masculino/Feminino-only icon pairing cannot itself prove the v2 data model restricts gender/sex to a strict binary (the actual field validation lives outside this partition), but the demographic-representation choice has clinical/LGPD-inclusivity weight, so per ESC-AMBIGUOUS-330 the committee must ratify the intended gender/sex vocabulary before v2 design commits to it.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-040.source_quote: registered against the exact same viewset (FormularioEnfermagemViewSet)
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-040.justification: Registering 'formulario-enfermagem' and 'formulario-enfermagem-novo' under the identical DRF basename against the same viewset is a legacy frontend-migration routing artifact with no clinical semantics and no behavioral difference between the paths, so per the AMBIGUOUS-band policy this plumbing is retired rather than ratified, consistent with ESC-AMBIGUOUS-348.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-041.source_quote: field masked as 00:00 and validated as a 24-hour HH:MM time OR empty string
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-041.justification: The optional HH:MM 24h-or-empty exit-time mask/regex is duplicated verbatim across nine discipline forms and is a correctly specified, reusable field-validation pattern with no bug, so it adopts directly into the v2 clinical-forms time-field validation schema.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-042.source_quote: Continuous vasoactive and sedative drugs recorded with bounded quantities
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-042.justification: Per escalation ESC-UNVERIFIABLE-285, dobutamina (0-30), noradrenalina.quantidade (0-200) and sedativos[].quantidade (0-30) are captured with no unit in the legacy form, and the numeric ranges are only plausible under different unit bases per drug (e.g. mcg/kg/min vs mg/kg/h), so the clinical committee must ratify the correct unit model before this vasoactive-dosing capture is designed into v2.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-043.source_quote: records site, insertion/dressing dates, dressing type and aspect
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-043.justification: The per-device checavel dressing/exchange-scheduling group (local, insertion/dressing dates, dressing-type/aspect enums, data_proxima_troca, external-insertion flag) across 14 device types is a sound nursing documentation workflow with no automatic interval computed, suitable for adoption into the v2 invasive-device tracking screen.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-044.source_quote: Two controlled-vocabulary assessment sections in the pharmacist evolution form.
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-044.justification: The pharmacist-evolution Avaliação Neurológica/Cardiológica sections reuse the same pupilas/orientacao/emocional/abertura_ocular and pressao_arterial/frequencia_cardiaca vocabularies already adopted elsewhere (RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-031/032), so this pharmacist-specific instance of the shared vocabulary adopts unchanged.

RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-045.source_quote: section in the nursing-technician evolution form: Orientação (level of consciousness)
RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-045.justification: The nursing-technician evolution's Orientação/Emocional pair is a strict subset of the pharmacist neuro vocabulary (RULE-FORMULARIOS-CLINICOS-044) with no Pupilas or Abertura Ocular fields, and since it introduces no new values it adopts directly into v2 as the TecEnfermagem-specific slice.

RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-001.justification: Escalation band UNVERIFIABLE mandates human ratification per policy even though the formula is self-consistent arithmetic; a clinical SME/product owner must confirm this proprietary alert-share sizing rule (not a clinical calculator) is worth carrying into the v2 dashboard before design proceeds.

RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-002.justification: Escalation band UNVERIFIABLE mandates ratification; the assisted-share formula gates the ASSISTIDO override state and has a known edge case (zero yellow/red alerts suppresses the 100% override) that a product owner must confirm is acceptable before v2 reuses this gating semantic.

RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-003.justification: Verdict VERIFIED against the standard Standardized Mortality/Lethality Ratio convention (ratio*100=percentage); this outcome-quality metric survives the platform change and should be reimplemented from AMH Gold fact_patient_score aggregates in the v2 correlation/outcomes reporting surface.

RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-004.source_quote: assistance view plots taxa_uso_sedacao * 100 (a rate as percentage, labeled "Tx. sedacao")
RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-004.justification: Escalation band P1 mandates ratification for this DISCREPANCY: two viewsets share the label 'Tx. sedacao' while one plots a percentage rate and the other plots raw days, a moderate-clinical-impact ambiguity under PADIS 2018 sedation-minimization framing that only a clinical SME can resolve to a single canonical representation.

RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-005.source_quote: colored red above 70%, amber between 50% and 70%, and green at or below 50%
RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-005.justification: Legacy Trilha-frontend circular-gauge stroke-color thresholds are pure client display mechanics tied to the retired dashboard component (DashboardCard.tsx); the underlying occupancy percentage itself is computed server-side and survives, but this specific strict-inequality color-banding UI rule does not carry forward into the v2 design system.

RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-006.source_quote: ASSISTIDO takes top priority; otherwise the highest-count color wins, with VERMELHO (red) preferred on ties
RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-006.justification: The three/four-color NEUTRO/AMARELO/VERMELHO(/ASSISTIDO) precedence tree is replaced by the vision-mandated canonical clinical.* severity scale (normal|watch|urgent|critical, per constraint CON-SEED-11); the ASSISTIDO-override and count-based tiebreak semantics are legacy Trilha-specific and are not reimplementable against the new scale as-is.

supersedes_note.replaced_by: canonical clinical.* severity scale normal|watch|urgent|critical
supersedes_note.lost: ASSISTIDO 100%-override precedence and VERMELHO/AMARELO count-tiebreak rules specific to the legacy 3-color scheme

RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-007.source_quote: DashboardItem.TotalAlerta defines four alert-count buckets — VERMELHO, AMARELO, NEUTRO, and LARANJA
RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-007.justification: Catalog status DISCREPANCY forbids plain ADOPT; the internal inconsistency (4-level DashboardItem enum with orphan LARANJA vs 3-level Ocupacao/Estatisticas enums elsewhere) is resolved by adopting the single vision-mandated clinical.* severity scale, which eliminates the divergent bucket counts entirely rather than reconciling them piecemeal.

supersedes_note.replaced_by: canonical clinical.* severity scale normal|watch|urgent|critical
supersedes_note.lost: the never-reconciled LARANJA fourth bucket and any code path that implicitly depended on 3 vs 4 levels

RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-008.source_quote: shown on a sector's dashboard card only when the parent company (empresa) is configured with tipo "automatica"
RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-008.justification: This is legacy Trilha tenant-type gating for an info-button deep link, wired to the retired legacy admin console's empresa.tipo field; v2 tenancy and access gating is inherited wholesale from the AMH Data Platform's Lake Formation ABAC model per ADR-001, making this bespoke tipo check obsolete plumbing.

RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-009.source_quote: displays "+99" instead of the exact number once it exceeds 99
RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-009.justification: The unread-message count badge and its +99 cap are legacy Trilha-frontend messaging-widget mechanics with no clinical content and no named v2 messaging feature in the vision brief, so this display rule is retired along with the component it belongs to.

RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-010.source_quote: a second (right-side) y-axis is only added to the chart configuration when the indicator data includes a y1 field
RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-010.justification: Escalation band UNVERIFIABLE mandates ratification even though this is pure Chart.js scales-config wiring with no clinical reference applicable; a design owner must confirm whether dual-axis charting for mixed-unit indicator series is retained in the v2 clinical-forms visualization spec.

RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-011.source_quote: central venous access variants, orotracheal intubation, tracheostomy, indwelling urinary catheter variants
RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-011.justification: This is a controlled PT-BR clinical vocabulary asset (10-entry invasive-procedure code-to-name lookup table: punção venosa central variants, intubação orotraqueal, traqueostomia, sonda vesical de demora) with status OK and verdict NOT_APPLICABLE and no escalation band, so it is adopted verbatim into the v2 clinical forms vocabulary.

RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-012.source_quote: labeling a generic 'any vasoactive drug' flag (DVA) as specifically 'noradrenalina' (norepinephrine)
RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-012.justification: Escalation band P1 mandates ratification: the DVA-to-noradrenalina key naming overstates specificity relative to Surviving Sepsis Campaign 2021's distinction between generic vasoactive drugs and norepinephrine as the specific first-line agent, and only clinical SME review can decide whether to rename the output key or clarify its semantics before v2 reuse.

RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-013.source_quote: find the most recent dt_referencia already stored locally, then pull from Oracle every row
RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-013.justification: This Oracle Tasy watermark-load ETL for occupancy indicators is exactly the proprietary ingestion pipeline ADR-001 forbids Intensicare from operating (MUST NOT implement own data ingestion; MUST read only from AMH Gold via Athena), so the mechanism is retired wholesale in favor of the AMH Data Platform's CDC-fed lakehouse.

RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-014.source_quote: processes only rows whose DT_MES_ANO falls in the current server year and current server month
RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-014.justification: The current-month-only macro-indicator Tasy ETL job is direct-to-Oracle ingestion plumbing forbidden under ADR-001's Athena-only-reads-from-Gold constraint, so it is retired along with the rest of the legacy Tasy sync layer rather than ported.

RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-015.source_quote: Synchronizes Trilha rows from the Oracle Tasy hospital system (TrilhaTasy), restricted to source rows referenced in the last 30 days
RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-015.justification: etl_schema v1 is a hardcoded 'americashealth'-tenant direct Oracle-Tasy-to-Trilha sync with silently swallowed exceptions (pprint only, no raise), the exact own-ingestion-stack pattern ADR-001 eliminates by mandating AMH Gold/Athena reads; retired with no successor mechanism to port since the AMH CDC pipeline replaces it entirely.

RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-016.source_quote: the flag is REASSIGNED (not OR-accumulated) on each loop iteration
RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-016.justification: Catalog status DISCREPANCY forbids plain ADOPT, and this novo_etl_schema v2 variant is doubly disqualified: it is both forbidden own-ingestion plumbing under ADR-001 and carries a known regression bug (criterio-modified flag overwritten instead of OR-accumulated, losing assistido resets) plus unreachable dead-code exception handling, so it is retired with no lesson worth adapting.

RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-017.source_quote: the bed list re-applies its current filters on a fixed interval to refresh occupancy data
RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-017.justification: Fixed-interval client-side polling for occupancy refresh is superseded by the vision-mandated WebSocket real-time push interface pillar (vision.md §2.2), which delivers updates event-driven rather than on a timer, eliminating the need for the reloadTime/AutoReloadContext polling mechanism.

supersedes_note.replaced_by: WebSocket real-time push (vision.md §2.2 interface pillar)
supersedes_note.lost: client-configurable reloadTime interval and manual AutoReloadContext on/off toggle semantics

RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-018.source_quote: to be reported at every level of the empresa > estabelecimento > setor hierarchy
RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-018.justification: The intent of a recursive nested KPI shape reportable uniformly at company/establishment/sector levels is sound and worth keeping, but the mechanism (an untyped recursive TypeScript interface with no mutual-exclusivity constraint between setores/leitos) must be corrected to a proper hierarchical aggregation over AMH Gold fact tables rather than ported as-is.

RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-019.justification: Catalog status DISCREPANCY forbids plain ADOPT; this is a verbatim-recorded legacy frontend networking-hook template-literal bug (stray closing brace after ${empresaId}) with no clinical content, so it is retired as a defect specific to the retired legacy networking layer rather than ported or corrected forward.

RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-020.source_quote: always includes usuario_id (current user) and data_entrada (current timestamp, stringified)
RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-020.justification: The intent of always server-stamping usuario_id and timestamp so client-supplied values cannot override the audit trail is a lesson worth keeping (an audit-integrity pattern), but the unrestricted free-form 'tipo' field with no enum validation is a mechanism defect that must be corrected against a proper schema-validated audit envelope in the new architecture.

RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-021.source_quote: no check that the user actually belongs to that sector
RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-021.justification: The intent of recording video-call entry events per sector is sound and worth keeping, but the mechanism accepts any client-supplied setor_id UUID with no tenant/sector-membership check, a deny-by-default authorization gap that must be corrected using the inherited AMH Lake Formation ABAC model rather than ported unguarded.

RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-022.source_quote: tx_mortalidade of exactly 0 is falsy in JS, so a 0% mortality rate is treated the same as absent
RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-022.justification: The intent of filtering the macro-indicator tile array to displayable string/number values is sound, but the truthy pre-filter on tx_mortalidade hides a genuine 0% mortality value, violating cluster constraint CLU-INDICADORES-ETL-C-02 that zero values must be displayable; the mechanism must be corrected to an explicit not-null/not-undefined check like the other numeric fields.

RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-023.source_quote: vidas_salvas), deaths (obitos), length of stay (tempo_permanencia), mortality rate (tx_mortalidade)
RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-023.justification: The six-field macro-indicator KPI shape (vidas_salvas, obitos, tempo_permanencia, tx_mortalidade, tx_ocupacao, admissao) is a stable PT-BR field-name vocabulary with status OK, verdict NOT_APPLICABLE, and no escalation, so it is adopted as the canonical macro-KPI schema for v2 reporting.

RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-024.source_quote: a temperatura of 0 or an RASS of 0 (a valid clinical value, e.g. RASS 0 = alert & calm) IS displayed
RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-024.justification: The dataExists(v) = v!==null && v!==undefined pattern used for RASS, Glasgow, diurese, lactato, etc. is sound and correctly shows clinically valid zeros, but four fields (pressao_arterial, delirium, noradrenalina, cateter_de_hemodialise) use a plain-truthy check that would hide a legitimate zero/empty-but-valid value; the mechanism for those four fields must be corrected to match the dataExists pattern per constraint CLU-INDICADORES-ETL-C-02.

RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-025.justification: The typeof==='number' display gate for the six 24h-window tiles (Balanço, Diurese, HGT, Evacuações, Temperatura Máxima, Ganhos) correctly shows valid zero values and has status OK, verdict NOT_APPLICABLE, and no escalation, so it is adopted as the canonical numeric-tile display pattern for v2 clinical forms.

RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-026.source_quote: tempo de internação (shown as "Xd") and mortalidade esperada (shown as "X%") are shown only when their value's type is "number"
RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-026.justification: The micro-indicator icon strip's per-field display rules (truthy booleans for noradrenalina/ventilação mecânica/sedação/hemodiálise icons, typeof-number for tempo_internacao and mortalidade_esperada) correctly preserve valid zero values for the numeric fields and carry PT-BR vocabulary verbatim, with status OK and no escalation, so it is adopted for v2 clinical forms.

RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-027.source_quote: the frontend TypeScript model (Models.Indicador) only declares a single literal for Tipo ('entrada_videochamada')
RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-027.justification: Catalog status DISCREPANCY forbids plain ADOPT; the reference-correct form is a frontend Indicador.Tipo union and Dados payload map that includes BOTH backend-enumerated tipos (interacao_notificacao, entrada_videochamada) with per-tipo serializer-matching payload shapes, eliminating the unrepresentable interacao_notificacao case and the unhandled-TypeError path when tipo falls outside the switch_validators map.

RULE-MOVIMENTACAO-ADT-001.source_quote: Uses .date() so partial days are truncated
RULE-MOVIMENTACAO-ADT-001.justification: LOS calculation truncates partial days via whole-day .date() differencing with no canonical clinical formula to check against; escalation band UNVERIFIABLE mandates ratification of the calendar-day vs elapsed-day convention before IntensiCare v2 dashboards adopt tempo_internacao.

RULE-MOVIMENTACAO-ADT-002.source_quote: the two implementations do not agree on the object shape
RULE-MOVIMENTACAO-ADT-002.justification: Backend manual movimentacao get_payload emits four micro_indicadores keys while the frontend union type declares six (adding hemodialise and mortalidade_esperada); DISCREPANCY status plus the UNVERIFIABLE escalation band requires ratification of the canonical v2 payload shape.

RULE-MOVIMENTACAO-ADT-003.justification: mortalidade_esperada is displayed with no formula, inputs, or units captured anywhere in this partition and is only presumed to be an APACHE II/SAPS-3-like score; AMBIGUOUS status plus UNVERIFIABLE band requires clinical committee ratification of the scoring source before v2 surfaces it.

RULE-MOVIMENTACAO-ADT-004.source_quote: combining vitals (BP systolic/diastolic/mean, temperature), neuro scores (RASS, Glasgow)
RULE-MOVIMENTACAO-ADT-004.justification: This VERIFIED composite assistencial panel (BP, temperature, RASS, Glasgow, delirium, fluid balance, vasopressor/hemodialysis status, and a full lab panel including lactate/pH/pO2/pCO2/P-F) is exactly the input set the v2 early-warning-scores and neuro-sedation domains require; carried forward with the noted BP-string and cross-model RASS type inconsistencies flagged for the v2 schema.
evidence: Sessler RASS Am J Respir Crit Care Med 2002;166:1338-44

RULE-MOVIMENTACAO-ADT-005.source_quote: Leito.nome is assumed to equal the legacy hospital system
RULE-MOVIMENTACAO-ADT-005.justification: The lookup resolves MicroIndicadores by (nr_atendimento, bed.nome=CD_UNIDADE) via .first(), silently picking an arbitrary row on collision; UNVERIFIABLE band requires ratification of whether this Tasy-coupled proprietary key survives the AMH Gold migration or is replaced.

RULE-MOVIMENTACAO-ADT-006.source_quote: Returns {} rather than None when unassigned
RULE-MOVIMENTACAO-ADT-006.justification: OcupacaoSerializer.get_paciente returns an empty dict instead of null when a bed is unassigned, diverging from ObservacaoSerializer's None convention elsewhere in the same partition; the UNVERIFIABLE escalation band requires ratification of the canonical empty-bed API contract for v2.

RULE-MOVIMENTACAO-ADT-007.source_quote: get_nome and get_idade delegate to model properties nome_fracionado and idade_paciente
RULE-MOVIMENTACAO-ADT-007.justification: This pure serializer field-delegation for patient name/age carries no clinical formula, but it is tagged with the UNVERIFIABLE escalation band, so per policy it is routed to ratification rather than a unilateral ADOPT/RETIRE decision on the underlying out-of-partition model properties.

RULE-MOVIMENTACAO-ADT-008.source_quote: The precomputed dict is dead/unused, and the serializer performs one query per row
RULE-MOVIMENTACAO-ADT-008.justification: Confirmed dead precomputed vinculos_paciente_leito context dict plus an N+1 query-per-row defect in SetorPacienteSerializer.get_vinculo; DISCREPANCY status plus the UNVERIFIABLE escalation band requires ratification of the intended single-query access-link design before reimplementation.

RULE-MOVIMENTACAO-ADT-009.source_quote: Hardcoded 3-hour subtraction (Brazil UTC-3) rather than a timezone conversion
RULE-MOVIMENTACAO-ADT-009.justification: Legacy hardcodes a naive -3h offset instead of a timezone-aware conversion for historical prontuario timestamps; the corrected mechanism is explicit America/Sao_Paulo tz-aware formatting (Brazil DST was permanently abolished in 2019 so UTC-3 is now stable year-round), preserving the same clinical intent of local-time display, per escalation ESC-P2-091.

RULE-MOVIMENTACAO-ADT-010.source_quote: Credentials are embedded directly in the URL string
RULE-MOVIMENTACAO-ADT-010.justification: The live-camera RTSP URL embeds establishment credentials directly in-string with no encoding of special characters, a security-relevant pattern; the UNVERIFIABLE escalation band routes the camera-integration approach to ratification rather than a unilateral RETIRE/ADOPT call.

RULE-MOVIMENTACAO-ADT-011.source_quote: a large block of commented-out dead code in the same file
RULE-MOVIMENTACAO-ADT-011.justification: The automatica/homecare 'assistido' flag delegates to an out-of-partition Leito.get_assistido property whose only available evidence is commented-out dead code; AMBIGUOUS status plus the UNVERIFIABLE band requires ratification against the confirmed RULE-013 manual-path algorithm before reimplementation.

RULE-MOVIMENTACAO-ADT-012.justification: The VERMELHO>AMARELO>NEUTRO bed-level aggregation across sepse/ventilacao/sedacao/estabilidade pathways, with notify-on-new-red-or-changed-red-content semantics, is exactly the correlation-engine rollup IntensiCare v2 needs for bed-card alerting; the PT-BR alert vocabulary is preserved verbatim.

RULE-MOVIMENTACAO-ADT-013.justification: The confirmed manual-path assisted resolution (all four pathways must be assisted or neutral, with all-neutral forcing False) is a validated cross-pathway aggregation rule that IntensiCare v2's correlation engine should carry forward unchanged for care-team-attended status.

RULE-MOVIMENTACAO-ADT-014.source_quote: used as a traffic-light severity indicator throughout the UI
RULE-MOVIMENTACAO-ADT-014.justification: The three-level PT-BR alerta vocabulary (AMARELO/NEUTRO/VERMELHO) is the canonical traffic-light severity scale reused across bed, trilha, feed, and chat surfaces and must be preserved verbatim for the v2 UI, with the unreconciled 4th-level LARANJA dashboard variant flagged as out-of-cluster for later reconciliation.

RULE-MOVIMENTACAO-ADT-015.source_quote: Ha itens do protocolo em atraso
RULE-MOVIMENTACAO-ADT-015.justification: The overdue-protocol-item icon, tooltip 'Ha itens do protocolo em atraso.' driven by trilha.has_item_em_atraso, is a clinically meaningful care-team cue worth carrying into the v2 bed-card UI, with the PT-BR label preserved verbatim.

RULE-MOVIMENTACAO-ADT-016.justification: The invasive-procedures alert icon, safely hidden via optional chaining when the array is undefined rather than throwing, surfaces clinically relevant line/catheter/device presence and should be carried into the v2 bed-card design with the same fail-safe-hidden behavior.

RULE-MOVIMENTACAO-ADT-017.justification: This is Next.js router.push page-navigation wiring specific to the legacy trilhas-frontend stack; IntensiCare v2 is built on a new frontend architecture per the platform change, so this navigation mechanism is retired while the underlying prescricao/balanco/evolucao pathway distinction is preserved via RULE-018's target.

RULE-MOVIMENTACAO-ADT-018.source_quote: returns None (falls through) for any other tipo
RULE-MOVIMENTACAO-ADT-018.justification: The intent of dispatching pathway retrieval by bed type (automatica vs homecare) is sound and must be preserved in v2's correlation engine, but the implicit None-fallthrough for manual beds should be replaced with an explicit tri-state case in the corrected mechanism.

RULE-MOVIMENTACAO-ADT-019.source_quote: resolves scope in priority order: setor
